title: Alloy Innovations
description: Useful metals and alloys, more quality of life.
body:
Curseforge for more information: [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alloy-innovations)

Discord: [Discord](https://discord.gg/PJkRU5pcxB)


## Alloy Innovations

Enhance your Minecraft experience by improving mining with new and useful metals. Each material is completely useful and essential, with various uses, mainly for tools that improve quality of life.


_If you have any questions about the mod, you can check the achievements or ask on the Discord server._



The mod adds many materials and mechanics.

## Metals
You can find the metals in caves, at different depths or with different requirements.

##
### Alloy Tables

You can craft alloys using alloy tables.

There are two types of alloy tables: **Basic Alloy Table** and **Advanced Alloy Table**.
Some alloys require the Advanced Alloy Table to be crafted.

![Alloy Tables](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ab1cab731fad54430b83eafaa7c74076b00a630.png)

##

### Charcoaling

Don't worry about not having coal if you don't have automated ways to obtain it in large quantities.


- Make a hole

- Fill the hole with logs

- Put a campfire

- Cover it

- And wait 20min

![Charcoaling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3cc28471b69a26477a32d383187d78e20da036a.png)
